items.title: Asia's migrant workers debate if Gulf jobs are worth deadly risk of Iran war
items.dek: Iran's strikes on Gulf states have been especially hard for migrants who have long supported these economies to lift their families back home from poverty.
items.body: Iran's strikes on Gulf states have been especially hard for migrants who have long supported these economies to lift their families back home from poverty.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US Army suspends crews who flew helicopters near Kid Rock's home
items.dek: President Donald Trump, when asked about the helicopters flying by his friend's house said: "They like Kid Rock. I like Kid Rock."
items.body: President Donald Trump, when asked about the helicopters flying by his friend's house said: "They like Kid Rock. I like Kid Rock."
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Peacekeepers killed by roadside explosion in Lebanon, initial report finds
items.dek: The deaths of the two Indonesian nationals came less than a day after another UN peacekeeper - also Indonesian - was killed in Lebanon.
items.body: The deaths of the two Indonesian nationals came less than a day after another UN peacekeeper - also Indonesian - was killed in Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk
